parameters.content:
### Daily Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — daily at 8:00. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Load Previous Snapshot

### Load Previous Snapshot

hubspot — `search` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Fetch Changes Since Watermark · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Fetch Changes Since Watermark

GET https://api.example.com/v1/requests — retries 3× with backoff on failure.

Ports: ①→ Normalize Records · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 API key / bearer for the target API

### Normalize Records

Custom JavaScript: Normalize incoming request records to a stable schema

Next: Upsert into PostgreSQL

### Upsert into PostgreSQL

postgres — `executeQuery` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Advance Watermark · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Postgres connection

### Advance Watermark

Custom JavaScript: Advance the incremental watermark to the newest record seen

Next: Persist Watermark (HubSpot)

### Persist Watermark (HubSpot)

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Cap Batch Volume · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Cap Batch Volume

Caps the stream at 100 items to protect downstream quotas.

Next: Align Field Names

### Align Field Names

Normalizes field names so every source feeds the same downstream schema.

Next: Save Execution Metadata

### Save Execution Metadata

Saves key fields onto the execution record — searchable later in n8n's execution list.

Next: Sort Requests Newest First

### Sort Requests Newest First

Orders items (newest first) so limits and digests pick the most relevant records.

Next: Summarize Run Stats

### Summarize Run Stats

Shapes the item: writes `runAt`, `itemCount`, `status`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Append Audit Row (HubSpot)

### Append Audit Row (HubSpot)

hubspot — `contact` operation against the connected account.

Ports: ①→ Send Summary to Slack · ②→ Capture Failure Context

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 HubSpot private-app token

### Send Summary to Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · ⚠ failures exit via the error rail · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

### Capture Failure Context

Shapes the item: writes `failedNode`, `errorMessage`, `workflow`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Escalate Failure to Slack

### Escalate Failure to Slack

slack — `action` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Slack OAuth2

# Augment contact records with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API end to end for Conversational AI

**Pattern:** Data Enrichment · **Level:** Advanced · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Augment contact records with HubSpot and HTTP / REST API end to end for Conversational AI. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual conversational ai is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Daily Schedule → Load Previous Snapshot → Fetch Changes Since Watermark → Normalize Records → Upsert into PostgreSQL → Advance Watermark → Persist Watermark (HubSpot) → …

## Use it for
- Teams that want to data enrichment without manual effort
- Anyone automating conversational ai in ai
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Scales without extra headcount
- Improves response time
- Responds in seconds

## Before first run
Connect credentials: API key / bearer for the target API; HubSpot private-app token; Postgres connection; Slack OAuth2.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🛟 Error handling & retries

External calls retry **3× with 2s backoff**. Anything still failing exits through its node's error output into the red error rail → context is captured and the on-call channel is alerted. Set an n8n **Error Workflow** in settings as the final safety net.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your conversational ai process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
